## Evidence

- [ ] Rule metadata includes `id`, `owner`, `status`, `severity`, and `category`.
- [ ] False-positive notes are documented.
- [ ] Fixture or representative event added or updated.
- [ ] `make detection-test` passes.
- [ ] Alert routing impact reviewed.
- [ ] Rollback path documented.
